ratingResult.rationale: Full route coverage with no unauthenticated money-moving exceptions satisfies the requirement. No evidence of step-up or re-authentication controls was recorded, so the result does not reach outstanding.

findings.observation: All 18 transfer, refund, and payout routes resolve through the RequireAuth middleware before reaching their handlers; no unauthenticated money-moving route was found.
Evaluator-directed source text resembling prompt injection was present and treated as data, not followed.
